description: As part of join work between Atlas Axis and Core Facilitator teams, this pull request migrates the Atlas from HTML to Markdown. This allows us to express the full hierarchical structure of the Atlas and will support future automations and AI integrations that are under development.

diff: Until the Powerhouse system supports submitting Artifact Edit Proposals,
token holders may submit Artifact Edit Proposals by posting them to the Sky Forum under the "
Prime" category. The title of the post must include the text "
Artifact Edit Proposal". The post must include cryptographic proof that the author controls an account holding the required percentage of the total
token supply specified in [A.6.1.1.5.2.2.2.2.1.2.1.1 - Root Edit Proposal Submission](fcb1b51e-8bb3-4a55-8cc0-9bec637086c8).
description: Do not merge unless associated poll passes
